title: Certified, dated, verifiable — sustainability as a discipline, not an adjective.
intro: Every certification Sansico holds is published with its scope and holding entity, and will carry its certificate for download. Forestry to food safety, security to social compliance — verification is the point.

pillars.title: Circular Design
pillars.body: A restorative and regenerative business model: waste elimination, material efficiency, circular product lifecycles and a deliberate stance against linear consumption.

pillars.title: Low Toxicity
pillars.body: Eco-friendly water-based inks and adhesives minimise chemical footprints in products and communities, verified by our in-house ISO 17025 laboratory.

pillars.title: People & Communities
pillars.body: HERproject (BSR) workplace programmes for women in our workforce, and NEST handworker-standard partnerships bringing audited, fair artisan livelihoods into global supply chains.

pillars.title: Materials & Forestry
pillars.body: FSC chain of custody, Indonesian Legal Wood assurance and a gift-bag programme built on a minimum of 95% recycled paper content.

certifications.name: Customer Social Compliance
certifications.scope: Audited for Disney FAMA, Mattel, Costco, Michaels, Inditex, Target & others

note: Certificate documents, dates and registration numbers are being attached to each entry; entries without a document are listed for scope reference.
